description_long: This is a cylindrical metal trash bin with a vertically ribbed body and a removable, slightly domed lid. The lid features a central rectangular knob for easy lifting and two side-mounted handles, which are rectangular and protrude horizontally. The body of the bin is seamless and uniform, with no visible openings or perforations, and the base is flat for stable placement on the ground. The bin is a classic design commonly found in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, and alleys. The surface appears to be matte gray, suggesting a galvanized steel or aluminum construction. There are no visible labels, symbols, or decorative elements on the exterior.
description: A classic cylindrical metal trash bin with a ribbed body, removable domed lid, and side handles, finished in matte gray. No visible labels or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid with a central knob and both side handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the central knob and one side handle, with the other handle not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the domed lid and both side handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, showing the central knob and the other side handle.
attribute_handle_design: external side-mounted handles and a top-mounted central knob
